text: I feel a peculiar sense of isolation here. The environment is dimly lit, with the sterile emptiness of the first room enhanced by the sterile glass and hard angles, and the second space revealing only vague, shadowy hints of its purpose. The words "R+D" suggest ambition and forward-thinking, yet the darkness implies stagnation or waiting. There is both a promise of creativity and a feeling of abandonment. My own presence here feels curious, almost intrusive, as if I am witnessing a pause between moments of activity.
